decks.notes: The main concept of this deck is to control the board through a combination of removal spells, creature sacrifices, and card draw. By utilizing cards like Defile, Crypt Rats, and Cast Down, the deck aims to keep the opponent's creatures in check while fueling its own resources with Ichor Wellspring and Nihil Spellbomb. Additionally, the deck incorporates token generation with cards like Khalni Garden and Campfire, as well as powerful finishers like Eviscerator's Insight and Troll of Khazad-dûm. The overall strategy is to outvalue the opponent and grind out a win through attrition.

The deck focuses on flooding the board with cheap artifacts and utilizing cards like Myr Enforcer and Galvanic Blast to quickly overwhelm the opponent. It also includes ways to draw cards and sacrifice artifacts for additional benefits. The synergies between artifacts and sacrificing them for effects like dealing damage or drawing cards are key to maintaining pressure and outpacing the opponent. The deck aims to be quick and aggressive, using the affinity mechanic to reduce the cost of artifacts and gain advantage in the early game.

This deck focuses on using cheap burn spells to deal damage quickly to the opponent while maintaining card advantage through cards like Faithless Looting and Grab the Prize. The creatures in the deck also provide additional damage output and utility, such as haste and card draw. The goal is to reduce the opponent's life total as quickly as possible while keeping enough resources to finish off the game with impactful spells like Fireblast.

The main focus of this deck is to overwhelm the opponent with a swarm of low-cost, efficient creatures. By utilizing cards like Thraben Inspector, Novice Inspector, and Kor Skyfisher, the deck can quickly establish a board presence. Cards like Battle Screech and Lunarch Veteran provide additional value by generating extra tokens. Prismatic Strands offers protection against removal spells, while Guardians' Pledge can provide a sudden burst of damage. With a mix of creatures, combat tricks, and removal spells, this aggro-weenie white deck aims to be fast and aggressive in order to pressure the opponent into submission.

The deck focuses on controlling your opponent's actions through a combination of counterspells and removal spells, while also utilizing gates to ramp up mana production. By using cards like Citadel Gate and Heap Gate, you can efficiently cast your spells and maintain board control. The inclusion of Guardian of the Guildpact and Outlaw Medic provides protection and life gain, while cards like Lórien Revealed and The Modern Age offer card advantage. Overall, this deck aims to slow down the opponent's game plan and establish dominance through strategic spellcasting and gate synergy.

This deck focuses on fast and aggressive creature plays, utilizing cards like Annoyed Altisaur and Avenging Hunter to quickly overwhelm opponents. By ramping up mana with cards like Utopia Sprawl and Arbor Elf, the deck aims to disrupt opponents' land base with Mwonvuli Acid-Moss and Thermokarst. Writhing Chrysalis and Eldrazi Repurposer provide additional creature options, while Malevolent Rumble can clear the way for an all-out attack. Nyxborn Hydra adds extra power to the board, while cards like Wild Growth and Boarding Party help maintain a steady stream of threats to pressure opponents. Additionally, Structural Distortion provides an answer to any problematic nonbasic lands.

The main focus of this pauper aggro-burn deck is to quickly deal damage to the opponent using efficient creatures like Voldaren Epicure and Sneaky Snacker, while also utilizing direct burn spells such as Fireblast and Lightning Bolt. With cards like Guttersnipe and Kessig Flamebreather to amplify damage output, the deck aims to overwhelm the opponent with a flurry of spells and creatures. Additional card draw and removal options like Faithless Looting and Grab the Prize help the deck maintain its momentum and push for a quick victory.

The main idea of this deck is to control the game using counterspells and card draw, while using cheap, powerful creatures like Tolarian Terror and Cryptic Serpent to apply pressure to the opponent. The deck focuses on efficiently using spells like Thought Scour, Brainstorm, and Deep Analysis to maintain card advantage and delving for powerful threats. Additionally, cards like Lórien Revealed and Deem Inferior provide additional utility and disruption, while Murmuring Mystic generates tokens to help seal the victory. The deck's focus is on resource management and disrupt the opponent's strategy while presenting a strong board presence.

This deck focuses on using cheap burn spells and aggressive creatures to quickly reduce the opponent's life total to zero. It aims to overwhelm the opponent with a constant stream of damage while also utilizing cards like Fireblast and Melded Moxite for burst damage. The goal is to end the game as quickly as possible by efficiently dealing damage and denying the opponent the opportunity to stabilize. The deck's strength lies in its ability to consistently apply pressure and finish off opponents before they can mount a comeback.

This mono blue aggro deck focuses on playing low-cost creatures and disrupting opponents with counterspells and tempo plays. The deck aims to quickly establish a board presence with efficient creatures like Delver of Secrets and Cryptic Serpent, while protecting them with spells like Counterspell and Spell Pierce. The deck also utilizes card draw and graveyard interaction to maintain resources and further pressure opponents. Overall, the deck aims to outpace and outmaneuver opponents through a combination of aggressive creatures and disruptive spells.

The deck focuses on quickly deploying artifact creatures and generating card advantage through artifacts like Thoughtcast and Ichor Wellspring. By utilizing the Affinity mechanic, the deck can swarm the board with efficient threats like Myr Enforcer and Reckoner's Bargain. The deck also includes removal spells like Galvanic Blast to clear the way for its creatures. The key strategy is to overwhelm the opponent with a combination of aggressive creatures and card advantage while also disrupting the opponent's game plan with artifact hate cards like Nihil Spellbomb.

The main focus of this deck is to consistently deal damage quickly and efficiently to the opponent through a combination of direct damage spells like Lightning Bolt and Galvanic Blast, as well as aggressive creatures like Goblin Tomb Raider and Veldaren Epicure. Additionally, cards like Clockwork Percussionist and Experimental Synthesizer provide consistent damage output, while cards like Reckless Impulse and Wrenn's Resolve help maintain card advantage and efficiency. Overall, the goal is to overwhelm the opponent with a fast-paced and relentless assault to secure victory.

The focus of this UR Control deck is to utilize spells to control the board and disrupt the opponent's strategy while generating card advantage through card draw and token generation. With a mix of removal spells, counterspells, and card filtering, the deck aims to establish board dominance and outvalue the opponent in the late game. By efficiently managing resources and reacting to threats, the deck seeks to maintain control of the game and secure victory through a combination of removal, countermagic, and card advantage.

The main concept of this deck is to maintain control using counterspells and removal spells while also having card advantage through cards like Murmuring Mystic and Augur of Bolas. It aims to disrupt the opponent's game plan by countering their spells and removing their threats, while also having a backup plan of generating tokens with Murmuring Mystic and winning through a more aggressive approach if needed. The deck also includes a variety of cantrips and card selection cards to ensure consistency in drawing the necessary cards for each situation.

The main focus of this deck is to swarm the board with Elves and utilize cards like Lead the Stampede and Winding Way to refill your hand with more creatures. With key cards like Priest of Titania and Timberwatch Elf, the deck aims to generate large amounts of mana and pump up your creatures to overwhelm your opponent quickly. The inclusion of Nyxborn Hydra provides a powerful threat that can end the game in just a few swings. Overall, this deck is designed to be fast-paced and aggressive in order to outpace and defeat your opponent.

The main focus of this Boros Aggro deck is to rapidly deploy low-cost creatures and use burn spells to quickly deal damage to the opponent. By continuously pressuring the opponent with a mix of resilient creatures like Glint Hawk and Kor Skyfisher, paired with efficient removal spells like Lightning Bolt and Journey to Nowhere, this deck aims to overwhelm the opponent before they can stabilize. The inclusion of artifact-based card advantage in Experimental Synthesizer and Relic of Progenitus helps to fuel the deck's aggression, while also providing answers to graveyard strategies.
